name: Perpetua Resources Corp.
description: Perpetua Resources Corp. is a development-stage mining company focused on the exploration and restoration of the Stibnite Gold Project in Idaho, USA. The company is dedicated to responsible mining practices, aiming to restore an abandoned mining site while producing gold and critical minerals like antimony, which are essential for national defense and clean energy technologies. By prioritizing environmental stewardship, transparent community partnerships, and sustainable development, Perpetua Resources seeks to provide significant economic benefits to the local community while securing a domestic supply of critical materials for the United States.
